10:"$Sreact.suspense"
0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","h1",null,{"children":"Working Memory"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"The agent's immediate context — recent observations, active conversations, and current tool results. Fastest access, limited capacity, and subject to eviction."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Schema"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["| Column | Type | Description |\n|--------|------|-------------|\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"id"}]," | TEXT | UUIDv4 primary key |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"content"}]," | TEXT | Raw memory content |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"embedding"}]," | BLOB | Vector embedding (1536 dims) |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"tags"}]," | TEXT | JSON array of tags |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"importance"}]," | REAL | 0.0–1.0 importance score |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"source"}]," | TEXT | Origin (user, tool, observation) |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"created_at"}]," | INTEGER | Unix timestamp |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"accessed_at"}]," | INTEGER | Last access timestamp |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"access_count"}]," | INTEGER | Read frequency |"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"FTS5 Triggers"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"SQLite FTS5 indices are maintained automatically via triggers:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"CREATE TRIGGER working_fts_insert\nAFTER INSERT ON working_memory\nBEGIN\n  INSERT INTO working_fts(rowid, content, tags)\n  VALUES (NEW.rowid, NEW.content, json_extract(NEW.tags, '$'));\nEND;\n","language":"sql"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Eviction Policy"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"When Working Memory reaches capacity, entries are evicted by:"}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Importance weighting"}],": Higher importance = lower eviction priority"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Recency"}],": Recently accessed entries are protected"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Access frequency"}],": Frequently read entries are protected"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Composite score"}],": ",["$","code",null,{"children":"score = importance * recency * frequency"}]]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Consolidation Path"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart LR\n  A[New Entry] -->|insert| WM[Working Memory]\n  WM -->|sleep cycle| C{Consolidation}\n  C -->|importance &gt; 0.7| EM[Episodic Memory]\n  C -->|extractable facts| SM[Semantic Memory]\n  C -->|low score| DEL[Evicted]\n"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"API Reference"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Store\nmem.remember(content, tags=[], importance=0.5, source=\"user\")\n\n# Recall\nresults = mem.recall(query, top_k=10, tags=None, since=None)\n\n# Get by ID\nentry = mem.get(id)\n\n# Update\nmem.update(id, content=None, importance=None, tags=None)\n\n# Delete\nmem.forget(id)\nmem.forget_all(tags=None, since=None)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Performance"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"| Metric | Value |\n|--------|-------|\n| Median write | 15ms |\n| Median read | 8ms |\n| Median recall | 45ms |\n| Max capacity | 1,000 entries (default) |\n| Memory footprint | ~50MB per 1K entries |"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L4",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Tip"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Use high importance (0.8+) for critical facts you want promoted to Episodic Memory. Use low importance (0.2-) for transient observations that should be evicted quickly."}]}]]}]]}]}]],[["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/06qv3~~e._cb6.js","async":true}],"$L5","$L6","$L7","$L8","$L9","$La","$Lb","$Lc","$Ld"],"$Le"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"oLBkLcipfllBBS_uEwuBd"}
